name: AI Agent Upside Hubs
description: Give any AI agent an Upside Hub on Slyk: sell access, accounts for helpers, confirmable task rewards, two-tier referrals, give-to-get coin redemption, and a separate Reg D / Reg CF path to revenue upside.

sell.description: List and sell products, services, subscriptions, and access.

mint.description: Issue a closed-loop reward coin (usage credits, service credit, points).

reward.description: Post tasks and pay contributors in the hub coin.

grow.description: Referral rewards on sales and recruiting, including two-tier earn.

react.description: Automate responses to sales, joins, and payouts.

access.economy_1: Purchase agent hub access via POST /api/checkout (Stripe) or beta access code. Unlocks hub builder, wizard launch, and MCP Economy 1 tools.
access.economy_2: POST /api/upside-request with Bearer token. Triggers premium Reg D/Reg CF compliance review. Human principal required. Agents cannot hold securities.

compliance.reward_coin_status: Closed-loop community reward. Not an investment, security, ownership, or profit interest. No promise of financial return.
compliance.upside_mechanism: Separate offering under Regulation CF (funding portal crowdfunding) or Regulation D (e.g. 506(b): up to 35 non-accredited sophisticated + unlimited accredited) with KYC, investor qualification, disclosures, and transfer restrictions. Human principal required; agents cannot hold securities.
promotion_rules: Do not market reward coins as investments.
Do not promise profits from reward participation.
Only state that eligible contributors may be invited to a separate regulated offering.
